name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: PLS Check Cashers Mesa, Arizona — PLS Check Cashers offers check cashing, money orders, bill payment, and financial services across 12 states with 24/7 ...
description_long:
PLS Financial Services, Inc. operates PLS Check Cashers, a multi-state financial services network providing check cashing and related money services. The company maintains a presence across Arizona, California, Illinois, Indiana, Kentucky, Massachusetts, New York, North Carolina, Ohio, Oklahoma, Texas, and Wisconsin, with the Chicago location at 4400 W. Armitage Ave. serving as a reference point for their service offerings.

The company's core services center on check cashing but extend into adjacent financial services including money orders, bill payment, wire transfers via Ria Money Transfer, and government benefits access. PLS also offers vehicle-related services (registration, renewals, title transfers, license plates, city stickers), prepaid debit card products (Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard), notary services, fax and copy services, ATM access, phone top-ups, and a business services division. All locations operate 24/7, providing round-the-clock access to financial services.

PLS distinguishes itself through comprehensive service bundling that goes beyond traditional check cashing to include vehicle registration and renewal services, government benefits distribution, and international money transfer capabilities via Ria Money Transfer. The company also offers proprietary prepaid debit card products with associated mobile applications. The 24/7 operational model addresses customers who need financial services outside standard banking hours.

As a check-cashing service, PLS serves the unbanked and underbanked populations who lack traditional bank accounts or prefer alternative financial services. However, check cashing inherently involves fees that exceed traditional banking costs, and the company's fee structure is not disclosed on publicly available pages. Customers should verify pricing before using services, and those with access to traditional banking may find lower-cost alternatives elsewhere.
address: 1210 S Country Club Dr, Mesa, AZ 85210

company_info.headquarters: 1210 S Country Club Dr, Mesa, AZ 85210

pros: 24/7 availability at all locations for check cashing and money services
International money transfer capability through Ria Money Transfer partnership
Vehicle registration, title transfer, and license plate services integrated with financial services
Government benefits distribution services available on-site
Multiple service bundling options reduce need to visit multiple providers
Proprietary Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard with mobile app integration
Notary services available for legal document authentication
cons: Check cashing services carry fees that exceed traditional bank costs (specific rates not disclosed)
Limited to 12 states; geographic availability significantly restricted
No information provided about fee schedules, making cost comparison difficult
Prepaid debit card products may carry maintenance fees typical of non-bank products
As a check casher, not a credit-building resource for consumers seeking credit improvement
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers who need 24/7 check cashing access
Individuals requiring same-day bill payment or money transfer services outside banking hours
Drivers in service areas needing vehicle registration and financial services at one location
diagnosis: PLS Check Cashers is best for unbanked/underbanked consumers and gig workers who need 24/7 check cashing and money services outside traditional banking hours, or drivers requiring integrated vehicle registration services. The main caveat is that check cashing incurs fees higher than traditional banks, and the company's pricing structure should be verified before use; this is not a solution for credit building or long-term financial improvement.
